subcodes.first_line: We have risen on this day and made mention of him who hath attained unto the recognition of God, at a time when every heedless and remote one was debarred therefrom. This is a day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اصبحنا الیوم و ذکرنا من فاز بعرفان الله اذ منع عنه کل غافل بعید هذا یوم فیه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @service to others; to the Cause of God
